posts.author: MarieBeach (Marie Beach)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

I would like to be able to pick a set day in every month for scheduling the generation of a PDF. For example, we generate our Project Highlight Reports on the 2nd Monday of every month. This option isn’t available currently.

What are you trying to achieve

We would like to be able to set our Project Highlight Reports to run and get sent on the 2nd Monday.com of every month.
